label_margin.reason: Need both failure and positive/partial labels for margin check.

coverage_report.allowed_decision: Do not use Memory-TAGE as a strong selector; prefer conservative/elite-preserving mutation.
forbidden_assumptions: Do not construct success_like preference pairs because no high-confidence success_like trajectory exists.
Do not treat positive/partial labels as reliable progress evidence because label-margin check is insufficient.
Memory labels are not reliable enough for strong Memory-TAGE selection.
